title: rubus micans subsp. subcanus
intro: Rubus micans subsp. subcanus, also known as the black raspberry or bramble, is a type of plant in the rose family that is native to eastern North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus micans subsp. subcanus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially aiding in the prevention of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
